basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding a Bachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology in Electrical or Electronics Engineering are eligible to submit their applications through Email on or before 27 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Upper age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Female candidates will be applicable as per the Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Engineering / Technology (Electrical/ Electronics Engineering)
qualification.details: Project Assistant: Bachelor's degree in Engineering / Technology (Electrical/ Electronics Engineering). Basic Knowledge of Power Electronics, Embedded System Programming, PCB Design.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_ism_dhanb: Bachelor's degree in Engineering / Technology (Electrical/ Electronics Engineering)

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT (ISM) Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: Bachelor's degree in Engineering / Technology (Electrical/ Electronics Engineering). Basic Knowledge of Power Electronics, Embedded System Programming, PCB Design.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Upper age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Female candidates will be applicable as per the Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on academic merit, experience, and suitability Online interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT (ISM) Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Engineering / Technology, specifically in Electrical or Electronics Engineering. Basic knowledge in related fields is also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for the Project Assistant position is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of ₹27,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Assistant position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to combine your CV and relevant documents into a single PDF and send it to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic merit, experience, and suitability, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach your CV and self-attested marksheets and degree certificates in a single PDF file.

faq.question: Q9. What should be the subject line of the email when applying?
faq.answer: The subject line of your email should be: "Application for Project Assistant for Project No. SRDP 1292 G".

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
